hero.title: Everything you are. One simple link.
hero.subtitle: Join millions of creators using Sparkbio to share everything they create, curate and sell — all from one link in bio.

features.title: The easiest way to connect your audience to everything you are.

customization.title: Fully customizable
customization.description: Make it yours with themes, colors, fonts, and button styles that match your brand.

analytics.title: Powerful analytics
analytics.description: Track views, clicks, locations, and devices. Know your audience better.

simple.title: Simple to use
simple.description: Add your links, customize your page, and share it everywhere — in minutes.

fast.title: Lightning fast
fast.description: Optimized for speed and SEO. Your profile loads instantly on any device.

pricing.title: Free forever. Upgrade when you need to.
pricing.subtitle: Start building your audience for free. No credit card required.
pricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to get started
